title.en: TRANSPORT, PERSONAL CONVEYANCES, OR ACCOMMODATION SPECIALLY ADAPTED FOR PATIENTS OR DISABLED PERSONS (appliances for aiding patients or disabled persons to walk A61H3/00); OPERATING TABLES OR CHAIRS; CHAIRS FOR DENTISTRY; FUNERAL DEVICES (embalming corpses A01N1/00)
Stretchers
with facilities for picking up patients or disabled persons, e.g. break-away type or using endless belts {(devices in general for lifting disabled persons A61G7/10)}
with skis or sled runners (ski vehicles A63C5/00)
Sheets specially adapted for use as or with stretchers (restraining devices used in nursing A61F5/37)
foldable or collapsible (A61G1/017 takes precedence)
convertible into chairs
with wheels
Parts, details or accessories, e.g. head-, foot-, or like rests specially adapted for stretchers
Supports for stretchers, e.g. to be placed in or on vehicles {(A61G1/0293 takes precedence; supports fixed to a vehicle A61G3/02 - A61G3/08)}

Ambulance aspects of vehicles; Vehicles with special provisions for transporting patients or disabled persons, or their personal conveyances, e.g. for facilitating access of, or for loading, wheelchairs
{Vehicles provided with medical equipment to perform operations or examinations}
{Means for reducing the influence of acceleration on patients, e.g. suspension systems of platforms (securing loads against shocks in general B60P7/16)}
{Ventilation, sterilisation or air conditioning aspects (in general B60H)}
Loading or unloading personal conveyances; Facilitating access of patients or disabled persons to, or exit from, vehicles
Accommodating or securing wheelchairs {or stretchers}

Chairs or personal conveyances specially adapted for patients or disabled persons, e.g. wheelchairs ({chairs with toilet conveniences A47K11/04; } devices enabling patients or disabled persons to operate an apparatus or device not forming part of the body A61F4/00; {running gear or propulsion features B60K;} bicycles specially adapted for disabled riders B62K3/16  {; Invalid chairs having removable seats specially adapted to be transferred with the invalid to a vehicle and support the invalid during use of the vehicle A61G3/02})
{Wheelchairs attached to a cycle steerable by an attendant (wheel chairs propelled by the patient A61G5/02)}
{convertible to stretchers or beds}
propelled by the patient or disabled person
motor-driven (A61G5/06 takes precedence; motor-operated rests A61G5/12; for vehicles with handlebars, equipped with three or more wheels B62K5/003, B62K5/023)
with obstacle mounting facilities, e.g. for climbing stairs, {kerbs or steps}
foldable
Parts, details or accessories
Beds specially adapted for nursing; Devices for lifting patients or disabled persons (stretchers with facilities for picking up patients or disabled persons A61G1/003)
{Means for bathing bedridden persons}
{with means for turning-over the patient}
{having means for attaching a cabinet in order to transport bed and cabinet together}
having adjustable mattress frame
with toilet conveniences, or specially adapted for use with toilets
Beds for special sanitary purposes {, e.g. for giving enemas, irrigations, flushings (A61G7/02 takes precedence; means for bathing bed-ridden persons A61G7/0005)}
Parts, details or accessories of beds (devices for prevention against falling out A47C21/08, A47D7/00 {; mattresses A47C27/00})
Apparatus for transporting beds
Devices for lifting patients or disabled persons, e.g. special adaptations of hoists thereto
Bed-pans, urinals or other sanitary devices for bed-ridden persons; Cleaning devices therefor, e.g. combined with toilet-urinals (urinals worn by the patient A61F5/44)
{Bed-pans}
{Urinals}
Cleaning devices {(washing and rinsing machines for crockery and tableware A47L15/00)}

Treatment rooms {or enclosures} for medical purposes (baby incubators, couveuses A61G11/00; devices for gas baths with ozone, hydrogen or the like A61H33/14  {; for isolating individuals from external stimuli A61M21/0094} ; containers or portable cabins for affording breathing protection in general A62B31/00)
{Isolators, i.e. enclosures generally comprising flexible walls for maintaining a germ-free environment}

with artificial climate; with means to maintain a desired pressure, e.g. for germ-free rooms (dust-free laboratory rooms B01L1/04; decompression arrangements B63C11/32; arrangements or adaptations in aircraft B64D13/00; air-conditioning in general F24F)
Oxygen tents {; Oxygen hoods}
Baby-incubators; Couveuses
{with height-adjustable elements}
{with movable walls, e.g. for accessing the inside, removable walls}
{tiltable about a horizontal axis, e.g. oscillating}
{with hand insertion windows, e.g. in the walls}

Accommodation for nursing, e.g. in hospitals, not covered by groups A61G1/00 - A61G11/00, e.g. trolleys for transport of medicaments or food {(service or tea-tables, trolleys or wagons A47B31/00)}; Prescription lists
{Trolleys for transport of medicaments, food, linen, nursing supplies (carts specially adapted for surgery or diagnosis A61B50/13; hand carts B62B3/00)}

{Supply appliances, e.g. columns for gas, fluid, electricity supply (vertical ducts or channels for receiving utility lines E04F17/08; installations of electric cables or lines, wall trunking H02G3/0431; structural combinations of lighting devices with other articles F21V33/0068; stands or trestles as supports for apparatus or articles F16M11/00; buildings for public purposes E04H3/08)}

Operating tables; Auxiliary appliances therefor (illumination of operating tables F21L, F21S or F21V {; adjustability of tables in general A47B9/00; tables for radiation diagnosis A61B6/04, drainage or irrigation pans, bags, or attachments A61G7/02, A61G7/0503})
{Obstetrical tables or delivery beds (chairs for gynaecological purposes A61G15/005)}
{Physician's examining tables}
{Autopsy, embalming or morgue tables}
{Orthopaedic operating tables (devices for stretching fractured limbs A61F5/04)}
{Physiotherapeutic tables, beds or platforms; Chiropractic or osteopathic tables (with incorporated massage means A61H2201/0138)}
Adjustable operating tables; Controls therefor
Parts, details or accessories (surgical drape sheets A61B46/00)
Operating chairs; Dental chairs (barbers' chairs A47C1/04); Accessories specially adapted therefor, e.g. work stands
{Foldable, portable or collapsible chairs, e.g. for surgery or dental treatment (portable, foldable or collapsible tables for surgery or treatment A61G13/105)}
{Chairs specially adapted for gynaecological purposes, e.g. obstetrical chairs}
{Physiotherapeutic chairs (with incorporated massage means A61H1/00)}
Chairs with means to adjust position of patient; Controls therefor
Parts, details or accessories (A61G15/14 takes precedence; dental instruments A61C)
Dental work stands; Accessories therefor
Coffins; Funeral wrappings; Funeral urns
{Reusable}
{Coffins with cooling arrangements for the corpse}
{specially adapted to be cremated}

Coffin closures; Packings therefor
Fittings for coffins
Sacks for corpses; Corpse wrappings
Urns (columbaria E04H13/00)
Hoisting or lowering devices for coffins
Funeral aspects of hearses or like vehicles
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass
Information related to the kind of patient or his position
Type of patient
Specific positions of the patient
the patient is supported by a specific part of the body

characterised by specific control means, e.g. for adjustment or steering
characterised by sensor means
with special adaptations, e.g. for safety or comfort

Color codes

by shape or form, e.g. by using shape recognition
using icons or symbolic figures, e.g. by a graphical representation symbolising the type of pathology or the organ by an image
using magnetic or electronic identifications, e.g. chips, RFID, electronic tags
